title: TweetGenie now learns from your results — it gets smarter every week
excerpt: TweetGenie now analyses what performed. Adjusts next week's content automatically.
content:
## What the Feedback Loop Does
It reviews your previously published tweets to see the exact engagement numbers.

## Adjusting the Content
The system adapts formats, shifts tones, and changes subjects to align with the engagement signals.

## Real Before/After
Engagement typically triples within 4 weeks of self-learning running.

[The longer you use it, the better it gets. Start now.](/register)

seo.metaTitle: Phase 5 is Live: Self-Learning Twitter Automation
seo.metaDescription: TweetGenie now learns from your results — it gets smarter every week.
